TextView.android:text:
Tracking Your Success

1. Monitor Weight Changes
Keep a weekly log of your weight to see long-term trends.

2. Body Measurements
Track waist, hip, and arm measurements for a better view of body composition.

3. Workout Log
Record your sets, reps, and weights to ensure progressive overload.

4. Energy Levels
Note how you feel each day to adjust your rest and nutrition.

5. Sleep Patterns
Track your hours of sleep to optimize recovery and performance.

6. Habit Streaks
Use a calendar to mark off days you successfully stick to your routine.

7. Photo Evidence
Take monthly progress photos to visualize physical changes.

8. Strength Milestones
Celebrate when you hit a new personal record in the gym.

9. Cardiovascular Health
Monitor your resting heart rate and recovery time after exercise.

10. Reflect and Adjust
Review your progress every month to set new, challenging goals.
